name: New World Online RPG
description:
NewWorld Online (NWO)

A VRMMORPG (VR GAME) with medieval fantasy elements, where the events of BOFURI: I Don’t Want to Get Hurt, So I’ll Max Out My Defense take place.

🛡️ Game Mechanics

Players choose a starting weapon upon login. This choice affects the entire build of a character. Some prefer combat, while others go the crafting route, sacrificing attack power for exclusive zones like crafter-only mines.

Non-combatants = Weak weapon damage
Throwable items like bombs = Unaffected by damage reduction

📜 Floor System (Layers)

First Floor: Lush forests, orbs of light, spiritual folklore. Towns made of wood. Floating islands above.

Second Floor: Medieval town. Stony aesthetic. Guilds like Maple Tree and Kingdom of the Flame Emperor reside here.

Third Floor: Steampunk paradise. City of gears. Home of the Machine God. Mechanized terrain and enemies.

Fourth Floor: Perpetual night. Japanese spirits (Yōkai). Home to powerful items like the Dewdrop of Heaven and bosses like the masked Fox Spirit.

Fifth Floor: Cloudy skies and weather-based bosses. Bouncy cloud platforms and hazelnut homes.

Sixth Floor: Haunted floor. Ghosts, graveyards, creepy mansions. Boss: Giant Spectre.

Seventh Floor: Diverse biomes: volcanoes, snowy peaks. NPCs with tameable monsters. A central town sits beneath a giant tree.

🌍 Environment & Immersion

Players experience different climates—snowy peaks, deserts, lava—but suffer no physical discomfort due to system auto-adjustments. Fatigue exists, as shown with Sally.

🧩 Quests

Triggered via items or NPC dialogue. Rewards range from EXP and gold to game-breaking skills. Requirements vary by stats, items, and action chains.

🧍 Avatars & Characters

Player-controlled in-game entities shaped by stats and build decisions.

📊 Stats: HP / MP / STR / VIT / AGI / DEX / INT
HP: Health Points – Lifeforce
MP: Mana Points – Skill casting
STR: Strength – Physical power
VIT: Vitality – Armor/Defense
AGI: Agility – Speed
DEX: Dexterity – Luck
INT: Intelligence – Magic damage
